R0204.title: Gas Fee Manipulation and Front-Running
R0204.definition: Miners or validators exploit transaction ordering rights to front-run user transactions through gas fee bidding or collude with arbitrage bots to extract MEV profits.

references.title: Flash Boys 2.0: Frontrunning in Decentralized Exchanges
Ethereum is a Dark Forest - MEV Threats

R0204.description: Miners or validators exploit transaction ordering rights to front-run user transactions through gas fee bidding or collude with arbitrage bots to extract MEV profits.
R0204.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
